title: Sea.Hear.Now Announces 2026 Lineup With The Strokes, Mumford & Sons, & More
author: Abby Jones
summary:
Sea.Hear.Now, the music and surf festival, returns to Asbury Park, New Jersey this September. Mumford & Sons and the Strokes will headline across the fest's two nights, with additional performances from the Offspring, Chaka Khan, the War On Drugs, Goo Goo Dolls, Fontaines D.C., Moby, Shaggy, Pixies, Kim Gordon, Ziggy Marley, the All-American Rejects, Men At Work, and more. There'll also be a surfing contest throughout the weekend.

The post Sea.Hear.Now Announces 2026 Lineup With The Strokes, Mumford & Sons, & More appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
Sea.Hear.Now, the music and surf festival, returns to Asbury Park, New Jersey this September. Mumford & Sons and the Strokes will headline across the fest's two nights, with additional performances from the Offspring, Chaka Khan, the War On Drugs, Goo Goo Dolls, Fontaines D.C., Moby, Shaggy, Pixies, Kim Gordon, Ziggy Marley, the All-American Rejects, Men At Work, and more. There'll also be a surfing contest throughout the weekend.

See the full lineup below, and sign up for presale access here before tickets go on sale this Thursday.

SATURDAY:
Mumford & Sons
The Offspring
Chaka Khan
The War On Drugs
The All-American Rejects
Shaggy
Men At Work
Susanna Hoffs
Fits And The Tantrums
Tom Odell
54 Ultra
Anders Osborne
Steph Strings
Nat Myers
Jarod Clemons

SUNDAY:
The Strokes
Goo Goo Dolls
